title: Proof of Ship - Season 7
description: [Proof-of-Ship](https://celoplatform.notion.site/Proof-of-Ship-17cd5cb803de8060ba10d22a72b549f8) is a monthly program for builders to grow their onchain reputation and **earn rewards** in the Celo ecosystem. Each month, builders prove their impact, showcase progress, and earn rewards. Your onchain reputation unlocks access to grants, retro funding, airdrops, and other funding opportunities. **Apply** by creating your project following this [guide](https://docs.gap.karmahq.xyz/how-to-guides/integrations/celo-proof-of-ship) and sign up for Proof of Ship [HERE](https://celo-devs.beehiiv.com/subscribe) to receive notifications. Learn more about bounties, agenda, and FAQs on the main [Proof of Ship page](https://celoplatform.notion.site/Proof-of-Ship-17cd5cb803de8060ba10d22a72b549f8).
